news_items.headline: This new trend is taking over ballparks, but why?
Anatomy of Andy Pages’ game-winning sacrifice fly vs. Mason Miller
news_items.summary: Since joining the San Diego Padres at last year’s trade deadline, closer Mason Miller has appeared in 44 games, and had scoreless appearances in 41 of them. The Dodgers accounted for one of the other three games in Tuesday’s win at Petco Park, helped in large part by Miller’s errant pickoff throw to first base […]

news_items.headline: Chase Burns hit by Bryce Harper comebacker, strikes out 9 and flashes All-Star form for Reds
news_items.summary: The 23-year-old, the second overall pick in the 2024 amateur draft, was terrific again in the latest start in his first full major league season.

news_items.summary: The Phillies slugger is thumping homers at a historic pace. Here's what his early stats say about how many he can belt by the end of the 2026 season.

news_items.headline: Cole to make long-awaited Yankees return Friday
news_items.summary: New York ace Gerrit Cole, 35, will make his long-awaited season debut Friday night, when the Yankees take on the first-place Tampa Bay Rays, his first start since undergoing Tommy John surgery last year.

news_items.headline: Burns dazzles, shakes off sting of 108.8 mph liner...
news_items.summary: Chase Burns struck out nine over six innings, lowering his ERA to 1.83 in the Reds' 4-1 win, and avoided a scare when he was struck on the backside by a 108.8 mph liner off the bat of Bryce Harper.

news_items.headline: Cardinals SS Winn undergoes MRI, not in lineup
news_items.summary: Cardinals shortstop Masyn Winn underwent an MRI on his left knee on Tuesday that came back clean.

news_items.headline: Sources: Crow-Armstrong fined after fan incident
news_items.summary: According to sources familiar with the situation, Cubs center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong, 24, is being fined an undisclosed amount of money for an incident with a fan in the outfield on Sunday at Rate Field during a game against the White Sox in Chicago.

news_items.headline: Wood races home for inside-the-park grand slam
news_items.summary: Washington Nationals outfielder James Wood hit the majors' first inside-the-park grand slam since 2022 against the New York Mets on Tuesday night.

news_items.headline: Pages wins duel vs. Miller to spark Dodgers in 9th...
news_items.summary: Freddie Freeman called Andy Pages' at-bat against Padres closer Mason Miller -- which yielded the eventual winning run for the Dodgers -- "one of the greatest at-bats I've ever seen in person, and I've been playing a long time."

news_items.headline: Braves catalyst Baldwin to IL with oblique injury
news_items.summary: Braves catcher Drake Baldwin, the reigning NL Rookie of the Year, was put on the 10-day injured list because of a strained right oblique muscle.
